title: Meta: Use binary search instead of a Trie for public suffix list lookups
task_prompt: Fix the failing tests in Tests/LibURL/TestPublicSuffix.cpp. The public suffix list lookup implementation produces incorrect results for certain domain names. The data is generated by Meta/generate_public_suffix_data.py which currently builds a Trie; the generated lookup code has a bug causing wrong effective TLD results. The tests in TestPublicSuffix.cpp document the expected behaviour — make them pass.
